hero.description: I'm Felipe Giacomini, a Full Stack Developer dedicated to building scalable solutions where technical performance meets intuitive design.

profileJson.name: name
profileJson.bio: Combining academic background with practical experience.

bullets: Full Stack web development on demand, from requirements gathering to delivery.
Architecture and implementation of systems using Spring Boot and Next.js.
Autonomous client management, scope definition and technical decision-making.
User support and maintenance of Windows/Linux infrastructure.
Development of internal automations to optimize business processes.
Development of internal management system in PHP with PostgreSQL.

backend.title: High-performance systems, data modeling, and complex business logic.

e_move_backend.description: Intelligent charging platform and route optimizer for electric vehicles. Focus on sustainability and efficiency.

clinicare_backend.description: RESTful API for patient management and clinical appointments. Layered architecture and integrated security.

frontend.title: Applications focused on user experience.
frontend.clinicare_frontend: Website with a complete landing page featuring services and specialists, as well as a dynamic and secure user authentication system for employees.

scripts.title: Scripts & Automation
scripts.description: CLI tools and infrastructure automation to optimize workflows.
scripts.port_scanner: A simple TCP port scanner for when you need to know which ports on your server are open.

contributions.title: Contributions
contributions.description: My contributions to the open source community.
contributions.atoll: Atoll turns the MacBook notch into a focused command surface for media, system insight, and quick utilities. It stays out of the way until needed, then expands with responsive, native SwiftUI animations.
